name: tChartXYZ #4: Chart. BTC All-Time High Moonshot (August 6, 2025)
description: Dive into the crypto cosmos with this NFT depicting Bitcoin's legendary all-time high chart pattern from August 6, 2025, against a mesmerizing Bitcoin Moon background. Part of the tChartXYZ series, where token price dynamics become timeless digital art pieces featuring epic patterns and blockchain flair.
